feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Subscription failed for sap build process automation
entry.content:
Team,

This happened while I was working in - trail BTP cockpit - Singapore Region -subaccount

Attached is the screenshot

CF info
https://api.cf.ap21.hana.ondemand.com 

PS: Referred to previous similar posts with same issue, but that did not help

entry.title: Need Help Creating An API Call In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I'm having trouble figuring out how to call an API from my Process/Workflow in SAP Build Process Automation.  I've scanned some questions/posts on this site, and I currently have these 'targeted questions' whose answers would help refine my understanding and might lead me to further questions.  Any help that could be given would be greatly appreciated.

IMPORTANT BACKGROUND: My organization has some administrative constraints around new subscriptions to things like SAP Build Process Automation.  So I'm 'learning and building' the Process/Workflow (that we'll ultimately need to deploy to the organization's BTP) in my own trial BTP account.  My organization's BTP has been in use (without any subscription to BPA) for a while and is being used, etc.  It has a Destination where the CAP/CDS project or whatever that would serve this OData endpoint, is 'hosted'.  Endpoints deployed into that Destination are reachable/callable from 'anywhere', like Postman running on my local machine.  In the Business Process in my trial BTP account, I was thinking I could call over to that, but I'm beginning to think that I can only call to Destinations configured in the same 'BTP space' or whatever, as the Process.

QUESTIONS I HAVE

Is the best way for me to approach this in my Process/Workflow - is the best approach to have a Destination and then be using that Destination? (once I'm building this in my organization's BTP 'space', this Destination would already be there though it looks like I might need to add some attributes etc. to it.  While I'm working a trial account, I'd just set up a Destination with a 'passthrough endpoint' whose implementation just uses executeHttpRequest etc., to 'call over' to the endpoint in my organization's BTP Destination, etc.).

Once I've added and correctly added an configuration, is it true that then in my Process/Workflow, I should be able to add an Action and my endpoint (or somehow the Destination with some sort of 'drill-down' to the endpoint, etc.) would then show up in the Action box?

Any help would be greatly appreciated.  Thanks!

entry.title: How to attach the uploaded files of sap BPA to email
entry.content:
Hi all,

In sap build process automation workflow, I used DMS to upload files.

Also, I used email notification for user alert.

And, I would like to attach the uploaded file from BPA workflow to email that can be able to download the files from users.

Is it possible to do so?

If yes, how can I develop that kind of setting?

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: SAP Process Automation - Desktop Agent Disconnects When Signing Out of Server
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an automation in SAP Build Process Automation for a client and installed the SAP Desktop Agent on the client’s server. The client’s server runs continuously, as I also have a Cloud Connector installed on the same server, which operates all the time. During registration, I used my BTP user ID to register the agent and also made sure the agent service is installed. The agent is running continuously and executing jobs successfully.

However, I am facing an issue:

  • The automation works perfectly when I am logged into the server.

  • But when I sign out of the server, the agent disconnects, and the jobs stop running.

To resolve this, I have already:

  • Configured the "Open and Unlock Session Automatically" option with the server name and credentials.

  • Ensured that the Desktop Agent service is running in "unattended" mode.

Unfortunately, this did not work, and the agent still disconnects when I sign out of the server.

My Questions:

  1. How can I keep the SAP Desktop Agent running even after signing out of the server?

  2. Are there any additional server or agent configurations needed to ensure automation continues running in the background?

  3. Should I use a service account instead of a personal BTP user ID for agent registration?

Any guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

@SAPSupport 
@maheshpalavalli 
@Archana 
@Dan_Wroblewski 
@Sankara1 
@Venkat_Vyza

entry.title: Gmail Integration with SAP Build Process Automation (RPA)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working on a custom automation in SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) using the Gmail features from the Google Workspace SDK. My goal is to automate data extraction from Gsheet file attached in Gmail. However, I ran into an issue right at the beginning, when trying to search for the email, the automation fails with the following error:

Error: Please specify user email Id
Exception: irpa_core.error.SequenceError

#Configuration

  • I'm using a Google service account key for authentication.

  • I call the "Google Authorization" activity at the start of the automation. I provided the userEmail generated in the Service Account key, and the authorization is successfully executed without any issue.

  • Search Email query parameter : "subject:" + Step0.searchSubject + " AND from:" + Step0.searchFrom.

  • Domain-wide delegation is configured in Google Admin Console :

   - https://mail.google.com
   - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive
   - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.modify
   - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

Has anyone experienced this? Could there be an internal requirement to pass the userEmail again within the Gmail task itself?

Any help, guidance, or shared experience would be greatly appreciated 🙏
Thanks in advance!
Kais

entry.title: Getting error while installing Desktop Agent 3
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am getting below error while installing Desktop agent 3. May I know what need to be done to resolve this issue?

I am following below link to install desktop agent

Install and Set Up Desktop Agent 3 | SAP Tutorials

 

 

 

 

Regards,

Jagadhatri

 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Not able to call a s/4hana(on premise) api using action projects from sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to call s/4hana standard api for business partner using action projects.

Below is the partial url -

"sap/opu/odata/sap/md_businesspartner_srv/C_BPEmailAddress" that is setup in the destination.

While executing our automation code, it fails with  below errors-

error messages-

Action execution resulted in ECONNRESET with message read ECONNRESET

query ENOFOUND <<our hostname>>

note- our desktop agent version - 3.39.45

We have setup cloud connector setting as per guide and destination is also working fine.

The url works fine at browser level as well.

Has anybody noticed any similar errors recently?

This setup was working fine before but has now stopped working suddenly from jan 2025 onwards.

Please advise.

Regards,

Saritha

entry.title: Missing steps in "Create and Edit the Automation" Tutorial
entry.content:
I am following the Learning Journey "Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation" (https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/create-processes-and-automations-with-sap-build-process-automation )

Section : Boosting the Sales Order Management Process with an Automation

Exercise: Create and Edit the Automation

Pg. 17, Step 52 of pdf: chrome-extension://efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj/https://learnsap.enable-now.cloud.sap/pub/mmcp/project/PR_D1366796546A5FA0/hands_on.pdf

Choose Sales Order > I cannot choose Sales Order even though I have created the Data Type as described in the Tutorial. The new data type is not available as a possible selection.

Data Type exists:

Not available for Selecting as Output Parameter:

I watched the video but it skips this part as well (2:41 of video)

entry.title: Hi all "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa. implementing the Build apps.
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am developing an sap build app mobile application. I had done all the Instances and Subscriptions to my project. when I go to sap build lobby and to open the project, getting error that 

 "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa.

in btp cockpit security->users-> i found custom IAS tenent and checked all are ok but still getting the same error can any one help me to out.

entry.title: SAP Build Process - return to top?
entry.content:
I have a request (api trigger) that starts a workflow (process) with 2 approvals.

1) Request triggers workflow

2) 1st approver adds information - approves

3) 2nd approver rejects workflow 

Ideally, I would like to send the workflow task BACK to #2

Is that possible?

James

entry.title: Issue with SAP Build Process Automation – CK40N Task List Table Not Capturing Individual Elements
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working on automating the Cost Run activity using SAP GUI with SAP Build Process Automation. While capturing the CK40N transaction screen, I encountered an issue where the “Task Lists” table is being captured as a single pane instead of recognizing each row or element individually.

Due to this, when I attempt to automate the "Change Parameters" step for the Marking activity, the bot either clicks the "Execute" button unintentionally or fails to interact with the correct row. I tried using the "Set Selected Row - Index change" to navigate to the appropriate row, but the issue still persists.

This limitation is affecting the accuracy of the automation, as the bot is unable to interact with the specific elements within the task list.

I have attached relevant screenshots for your reference.

Requesting your assistance in resolving this issue or providing a recommended approach to accurately capture and interact with the task list table elements in CK40N using SAP Build Process Automation.

Thanks In Advance,
Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation #SAP GUI #CK40N

entry.title: Desktop Agent 3 for Mac OS
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Why Desktop Agent 3 download option not available for Mac OS? Some time back, we had that option.
https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloud

Now, how can a P* user register the Desktop Agent 3 with Mac OS?

Thank you.

Kind Regards,
Bhargava

entry.title: Test Run doesn't start in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

In the recent days the Run in SBP doesn't work.

I get a message telling me that there was a probem reaching the agent.

I upgraded the agent and made sure that the extension is working.

I tried it on several computers and on both Chrome and Edge.

I created a very simple automation that only write log message, in case the problem is in a specific activity.

Nothing works.

Can you please help?

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Subscription Failed - SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I am currently working through the "Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation" Learning Journey. However, while attempting to subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation, I’ve encountered a "Subscription Failed" error. I’ve tried subscribing three times, but the issue persists.

I would appreciate your guidance on how to resolve this issue. Thank you!

Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Tutorials

entry.title: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm encountering an issue when trying to connect to an OData service in SAP. The error message I'm getting is:

"The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination."

I can see this issue when trying to add a new action using the OData integration. 

I’ve already checked the destination configuration in SAP BTP and verified the URL.

 

Has anyone faced this issue before? What could be the possible reasons or steps to resolve it?

Any help or guidance would be appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error Handling in SAP BPA Processes | How Should I Handle Build Process Errors?
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

During my recent builds in SAP Process Automation I have noticed there are considerably fewer resources for error handling in "processes" than in "automations." On the automations side there is a sub flow tab that allows you to pass on error details with additional flow steps. For example, you can add a notification form for your user containing the current error, allowing the automation to fail gracefully.

I currently have a process that contains an API Action that posts to an external service. When this Action fails it ends the process completely and does not pass outputs to any subsequent process steps. I can see the error in the monitoring tab but the end user, obviously, will not. How do you follow design principles in SAP BPA processes?

I searched the community and product documentation on this subject but could only find answers related to the "automation" side.

Any recommendations, guidance, or links to resources would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to assign SAP user (not BTP email) in Approval Step in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m building a workflow in SAP Build Process Automation, and I need to assign an SAP backend user to the Approval Request step.

I don’t want to assign the task using a BTP user email — I want to use the SAP user (e.g., from S/4HANA) instead.

Is it possible to assign approval tasks based on SAP usernames or user IDs?
If so:

  • How should the user be referenced in the process?

  • Do I need to configure anything in Identity Authentication or Cloud Connector to make this work?

Any help or clarification would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Your job cannot be distributed because there is no agent that matches this SDK version
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am getting the error 'Your job cannot be distributed because there is no agent that matches this SDK version' while executing a BPA based workflow.

From error description, it is clear that, this is due to agent version mismatch and as a result the Workflow cannot proceed further.

For the similar issue, there is a already community post here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-build-your-job-cannot-be-distributed-because-there-is-no-agent-defined/qaq-p/12675847 and also there is a SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3191086.

The actual problem here is, the agent download link mentioned in the above NOTE re-directs to the download page with obsolete versions, which I have already installed and they are not working, because the project is expecting agent with version above 3.13.

It is disabled to change the project version to lower version in build project agent version settings.

Where can we download the latest version of the agents ? or is there a way to change agent ersion settings in SAP Build project ?

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Install and Set Up Desktop Agent 3
entry.content:
I am trying to follow the "Install and Set Up Desktop Agent 3" Tutorial.

I initially tried to follow the "Automatically" workflow but I got stuck at Step 2.4 -it will not allow me to add any Username to create a Technical User (tried my username from SAP Build, my email address, just a standard String, nothing works):

I believe my user has the correct Role Collections:

So I gave up on following that workflow and now I'm following the "Manually" workflow. I was able to install the Desktop Agent but I cannot Activate the Tenant or see my Agent in Control Tower > Agents.

  • After I click to Activate the Tenant it opens up the Edge browser without any URL.
  • So I copy & paste the Tenant URL
  • It takes me to the login page but wont accept my credentials and doesn't log in automatically 

Tenant shows as Unregistered:

entry.title: Unable to subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I hope you're all doing well!

I'm currently facing issues creating a subscription for SAP Build Process Automation; it's giving me an error message saying the below message.

"Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.”
I have attached a screenshot of the error for your reference.

Please, could you assist me in resolving this issue? I appreciate your help in advance!

Best regards,
